The '''Cyborreans''' were the native sentient [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cyborrea/Legends|Cyborrea]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were almost always at war with each other, and were a client species of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. When not engaged in battle, they hunted the vicious creatures of their planet to keep their skills sharp. They were known for breeding [[Nek/Legends|Cyborrean Battle Dogs]], vicious, dog-sized creatures that were fitted with armor and [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] implants. They were often sold on the black market.
